series_metadata.series_description: The Subrogation Revenue Collection Files are used to record the funds recovered from the parties of subrogation cases. The Subrogation Revenue Collection Files are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). The Universal Document Service (UDS) is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: After collection, scan the Subrogation Revenue Collection Files into the UDS subrogation database. Once the scanned versions of the Subrogation Revenue Collection Files have been verified for quality assurance; then destroy the paper documents. ; Electronic: Review the machine readable information every 3 years to ensure that the files can still be accessed. Maintain in UDS subrogation database for 20 years; then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
